_comment: Vendored from ainumbers.co. The site copy at https://ainumbers.co/data/suite-map.json is the SSOT. Keep in sync whenever that copy updates.

_insertNotes.Authorize_before_Run: Insert {id:'authorize',num:2,label:'Authorize',...} at index 1; increment subsequent nums; update anchor-suite pages wayfinder HTML.

steps.label: Learn
steps.role: Understand the suite, the standard, and what each tool does

steps.label: Run
steps.role: Execute tools, workflows, and agent automations

steps.label: Ledger
steps.role: Receipts land and are checked here; verify, anchor, and keep from inside the Ledger

anchor_placement.badge_text: Anchor: standalone evidence tools · receipts live in the Ledger
anchor_placement.note: Anchor is not a rail stop. Pages show the 3-stop rail as context with an appended standalone badge. Never light a stop.
